layers.name: Project Scaffolding & Configuration
layers.description: Build automation, container definitions, API documentation, and frontend data-hook utilities that support development and deployment workflows.

layers.name: API Server Entrypoint
layers.description: Bootstrap logic that wires dependencies and starts the HTTP API server process.

layers.name: Shared UI Components
layers.description: Reusable frontend React components (forms, headers, calendar, sign-in button) and a small set of backend helper functions for time/date operations.

layers.name: HTTP Middleware
layers.description: Request-pipeline filters for authentication, role-based authorization, CORS headers, and structured request logging.

layers.name: Data Persistence Layer
layers.description: Repository pattern implementations, parameterized SQL query files, and database migration scripts that encapsulate all persistent storage access.

layers.name: App Configuration
layers.description: Defines application configuration loading and editor/IDE settings.

layers.name: Shared Core & Services
layers.description: Domain models, shared frontend/backend libraries, error types, HTTP utilities, and business service implementations.

layers.name: UI Component Library
layers.description: Reusable UI components and page layout elements for the frontend.

layers.name: Development Scripts
layers.description: Utility scripts for development and CI tasks such as test coverage reporting.

layers.name: Test Suite
layers.description: Automated unit and integration tests covering domain models, services, handlers, and utilities.
